69. Though one may be a king, he will become a servant of his own servants in the Dasas of a
planet devoid of strength, a planet totally devoid of strength, a planet in fall, a planet in deep
fall, a planet in inimical Sign and a planet in dead enemys.
70. In the Dasa of a planet placed in enemys Sign, there will be circumstances to leave ones own
country (in distress), diseases, loss of position, frequent quarrels and confinement.
71. Even a king with vast number of elephants, that can wet the earth with their ichors, will surely
wander in difficulty in the Dasa of a planet occupying an inimical Sign.
72-73. In the Dasas of the planets placed in the 6th, 5th, 9th, or 7th Houses identical with inimical
Signs, there will be troubles to limbs and secondary limbs (like the nose), while the Dasa of
the planet in the 8th House identical with its inimical House will cause beheading (or afflictions
